series_metadata.series_description: Statistical data obtained from rating organizations, statistical agents, and insurance companies and any ODI produced reports generated from said data (Paper/Electronic)

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain a minimum of 5 years of data and the reports created from said data, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain a minimum of 5 years of data and the reports created from said data, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
